scripts.test:smoke: bun run build && bun test tests/layout-smoke.test.ts
scripts.check: biome check --write . && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.check:ci: biome ci . && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.biome:migrate: biome migrate eslint --write && biome migrate prettier --write
scripts.sanity:typegen: sanity schema extract && sanity typegen generate
scripts.secrets:sync: doppler secrets --project tulio-cunha-website --json | jq -c 'with_entries(select((.key as $k | ["SANITY_API_READ_TOKEN","SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN","DEV_TO_API_KEY","HASHNODE_API_KEY","GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN","SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET","LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN","LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID","HASHNODE_ACCESS_TOKEN","HASHNODE_PUBLICATION_ID"] | index($k))) | .value = .value.computed)' | wrangler secret bulk --env ""
scripts.secrets:sync:stg: doppler secrets --project tulio-cunha-website --config stg --json | jq -c 'with_entries(select((.key as $k | ["SANITY_API_READ_TOKEN","SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN","DEV_TO_API_KEY","HASHNODE_API_KEY","GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN","SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET","LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN","LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID","HASHNODE_ACCESS_TOKEN","HASHNODE_PUBLICATION_ID"] | index($k))) | .value = .value.computed)' | wrangler secret bulk --env stg
scripts.secrets:sync:prd: doppler secrets --project tulio-cunha-website --config prd --json | jq -c 'with_entries(select((.key as $k | ["SANITY_API_READ_TOKEN","SANITY_API_WRITE_TOKEN","DEV_TO_API_KEY","HASHNODE_API_KEY","GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN","SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET","LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN","LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID","HASHNODE_ACCESS_TOKEN","HASHNODE_PUBLICATION_ID"] | index($k))) | .value = .value.computed)' | wrangler secret bulk --env prd
scripts.deploy:stg: bun run secrets:sync:stg && wrangler deploy --env stg
scripts.deploy:prd: bun run secrets:sync:prd && wrangler deploy --env prd
